violations.text: Pasta and Potato Salad was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was holding ambient of 44 DF. Blower fan in unit was obstructed. Product moved in Unit, ambient held at 37DF. Pasta and potato salad was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Gaskets on the one door reach in and milk case were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The hot hold unit located on the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/12/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk case 1. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The two door traulsen located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Correct by 10/24/24 The high temperature mechanical dishwasher was not in working order. Equipment must be maintained in good repair New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025
The nozzle on the pre-flush spray nozzle is in poor repair. The nozzle on the pre flush spray hose on the three be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opene) observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the can opener during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

Droppings observed in the kitchen, underneath all equipment. Per interview of staff, pest control is active. Establishment shall clean and remove droppings in the kitchen. If droppings still observed, establishment must get pest control to do a full assessment/evaluation of facility. Proof of pest control must be provided to Inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

Ice buildup observed in dairy chest coolers 2 and 3. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. -Establishment shall remove ice buildups from both units. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
